entries.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
entries.description: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

entries.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
entries.description: SOND introduced its debut product: Dreambuds, a closed-loop, in-ear system that captures 12 physiological signals from the wearer, then acts on them in real time to help consumers get better sleep.

entries.title: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
entries.description: China's AI boom is producing world-class talent, and Beijing is increasingly reluctant to let them go elsewhere.

entries.title: ClickHouse triples annualized revenue to $250M, charting a path toward an IPO
entries.description: The database provider is eyeing a public debut within the next few years.

entries.title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
entries.description: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.

entries.title: DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search
entries.description: Google overhauled Search at I/O 2026, replacing blue links with AI agents. The backlash has been swift. DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users seek a way out.

entries.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
entries.description: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.
